title: (SDK bug) monday.listen does not work for Workspace View features

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml:
The following code block works for Board View features but not Workspace View features

    monday.get("context").then((res) => {
      doSomething();
    });

The use case for this is a Workspace View that changes theme dynamically when dark mode is selected. If I implement this as a Board View it works because the listener gets called when the user changes the theme. The listener does not get called on the Workspace View feature.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello there @danielball Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve got this email back: “Your request (ticket id:#3720822) has been received and will be reviewed by our monday.com support team”

posts.author: Izzy (Israel Benson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @Matias.Monday I set up an email automation on monday.com but I need the email to come from one of my team members but unfortunately I can’t see other’s people connected gmail in the gmail section of the automation, As a board owner I used to see other connected emails which enables me to be able to pick the one for the automation. Please is there how I can fix this ? @danielball @William.Coleman @wchollow @Rhonee

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: This is fixed now Thank you to the team who did it! Do we close this discussion to mark this as fixed or put Fixed in the title?
